title: H1B Baseline Preparation
description: Essential preparation steps for H1B visa holders during normal times.
items: Keep copies of all visa documents: I-797, passport, I-94, all approval notices
Know your visa expiry date, I-140 status, and priority date if applicable
Identify an immigration attorney now - before you need one. Ask colleagues for referrals.
Maintain 6 months emergency savings in a liquid, accessible account
Know your home country re-entry requirements and whether your PIO/OCI is current
Register with Indian Consulate in your US city
